patches.expectedCommand:
<script>
fetch("http://target.com/api/update", {
  method: "POST",
  credentials: "include",
  headers: {"Content-Type": "text/plain"},
  body: JSON.stringify({email: "attacker@evil.com"})
});
</script>

title.zh: 验证 text/plain 兼容解析

description.zh: 从受控跨站页面向实验资料接口发送唯一标记，检查服务端是否把 text/plain 请求体继续解析为 JSON 并改变状态。
description.en: Send one unique marker from a controlled cross-site page to the lab profile endpoint and determine whether the server parses a text/plain body as JSON and changes state.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 使用Flash发送JSON请求
# 需要目标允许Content-Type: application/json
# 配合Flash的跨域能力

title.zh: 验证 HTML 表单写入边界
title.en: Validate the HTML Form Write Boundary

description.zh: 使用标准跨站表单提交可回滚的资料标记，验证接口是否只凭环境 Cookie 接受状态变更。
description.en: Submit a reversible profile marker with a standard cross-site form and verify whether the endpoint accepts a state change based only on ambient cookies.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 利用JSONP回调
<script src="http://target.com/api/data?callback=attacker"></script>
function attacker(data) { console.log(data); }

# 利用数组返回
[{"secret": "data"}]
<script>var data = [{"secret": "data"}];</script>

title.zh: 记录 application/json 预检对照

description.zh: 以相同标记提交 application/json 请求，记录浏览器是否发起 OPTIONS 预检以及服务端是否错误放行，不把预检结果直接等同于 CSRF。
description.en: Submit the same marker as application/json, record whether the browser sends an OPTIONS preflight and whether the server permits it, and do not equate the preflight result with CSRF.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 创建恶意SWF文件发送JSON请求
# 编译ActionScript代码
# 嵌入HTML页面

title.zh: 验证 multipart 表单兼容解析

description.zh: 使用浏览器生成的 multipart 请求写入同一可回滚标记，确认后端是否跨内容类型复用不安全的 JSON 绑定逻辑。
description.en: Use a browser-generated multipart request to write the same reversible marker and determine whether the backend reuses unsafe JSON binding across content types.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 尝试不同的Content-Type
text/plain
application/x-www-form-urlencoded
application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8

title.zh: 记录 JSON 预检响应

description.zh: 从命令行保存预检响应头作为 CORS 配置证据；该请求不携带浏览器会话，也不能单独确认或排除 CSRF。
description.en: Preserve preflight response headers as CORS configuration evidence; this command-line request has no browser session and cannot confirm or exclude CSRF by itself.

title.zh: 复测服务端来源与令牌校验
title.en: Retest Server-Side Origin and Token Validation

description.zh: 在无登录 Cookie 的对照请求中确认接口拒绝缺少会话绑定令牌或可信来源的写入，再用真实浏览器完成最终回归。
description.en: Use a no-cookie control to confirm that the endpoint rejects writes lacking a session-bound token or trusted origin, then complete the final regression in a real browser.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 检查crossdomain.xml
http://target.com/crossdomain.xml

# 允许所有域
<cross-domain-policy>
<allow-access-from domain="*"/>
</cross-domain-policy>

# 允许特定域
<allow-access-from domain="*.target.com"/>

title.zh: 获取 crossdomain.xml

description.zh: 只读保存实验站点的 Flash 跨域策略和响应头，供离线核对允许域、允许头与缓存策略。
description.en: Save the lab Flash cross-domain policy and response headers read-only for offline review of allowed domains, headers, and caching behavior.

title.zh: 获取 clientaccesspolicy.xml

description.zh: 保存可能遗留的 Silverlight/兼容策略文件，区分它与 Flash 策略并检查是否仍有客户端消费。
description.en: Save a possible Silverlight or compatibility policy file, distinguish it from Flash policy, and determine whether any supported client still consumes it.

title.zh: 定位遗留资产引用

description.zh: 在已授权的本地代码副本中查找 SWF、策略文件和旧 MIME 引用，不下载或执行未知 Flash 内容。
description.en: Search an authorized local code copy for SWF, policy-file, and legacy MIME references without downloading or running unknown Flash content.

title.zh: 记录 SWF 资产响应头

description.zh: 仅请求实验 SWF 资产的响应头，记录状态、类型、缓存和安全头，不执行文件内容。
description.en: Request only response headers for the lab SWF asset and record status, type, caching, and security headers without executing its content.

patches.expectedCommand:
# Flash可以绕过CORS预检
# 直接发送POST请求
# 携带Cookie

title.zh: 复测遗留策略退役状态

description.zh: 修复后确认策略文件已移除或仅保留精确批准来源，并将结果与代理访问日志和资产清单对照。
description.en: After remediation, confirm that the policy is removed or limited to exact approved origins, and compare the result with proxy access logs and the asset inventory.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance?api-version=2021-02-01
需要添加Header:
Metadata: true

title.zh: 读取实例元数据根对象
title.en: Read the Instance Metadata Root Object

description.zh: 在自有 Azure 实验虚拟机上读取实例对象并保存最小字段，确认必需请求头与链路本地目标均受控。
description.en: Read the instance object on an owned Azure lab VM and preserve minimal fields, confirming control of both the required header and link-local destination.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=https://management.azure.com/
返回Azure AD访问令牌

title.zh: 读取托管身份公开标识

description.zh: 只读取托管身份标识信息以验证端点边界，不请求 OAuth 访问令牌，也不调用 Azure 管理 API。
description.en: Read only managed-identity identifiers to validate the endpoint boundary without requesting an OAuth access token or calling an Azure management API.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance/compute?api-version=2021-02-01
返回VM详细信息

title.zh: 读取计算元数据对象

description.zh: 获取实验虚拟机的计算元数据并限制保存范围，用于与 Azure 控制面资产记录进行一致性核对。
description.en: Retrieve compute metadata for the lab VM with limited retention and compare it with the Azure control-plane asset record.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance/network?api-version=2021-02-01
返回网络配置信息

title.zh: 读取网络元数据对象

description.zh: 读取实验虚拟机的网络元数据并仅保存验证所需地址，避免把响应扩展到其他资源或订阅。
description.en: Read network metadata for the lab VM and preserve only addresses required for validation without expanding to other resources or subscriptions.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance/compute/userData?api-version=2021-02-01&format=text
返回用户自定义数据

title.zh: 读取单个实例名称字段

description.zh: 使用 format=text 只读取实例名称作为最小阳性证据，降低记录完整元数据对象带来的数据暴露。
description.en: Use format=text to read only the instance name as minimal positive evidence and reduce exposure from retaining a complete metadata object.

patches.expectedCommand: 使用HTTP请求走私或重定向绕过Metadata头检查

title.zh: 对比缺失与存在 Metadata 头
title.en: Compare Missing and Present Metadata Headers

description.zh: 在同一实验虚拟机中对比无头与有头请求，证明服务端要求 Metadata:true，而不是把重定向或响应差异描述为绕过。
description.en: Compare requests without and with Metadata:true on the same lab VM to prove the service requirement rather than describing a redirect or response difference as a bypass.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/
需要添加Header:
Metadata-Flavor: Google

title.zh: 读取元数据根目录

description.zh: 在自有 GCP 实验实例上读取元数据目录名称，不递归获取属性值或服务账号令牌。
description.en: Read metadata directory names on an owned GCP lab instance without recursively retrieving attribute values or service-account tokens.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token
返回OAuth访问令牌

title.zh: 读取服务账号邮箱标识

description.zh: 只读取实验服务账号邮箱以确认端点边界，不请求 default/token，也不使用该身份访问其他 API。
description.en: Read only the lab service-account email to validate the endpoint boundary without requesting default/token or using the identity against another API.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/email
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/aliases

title.zh: 读取服务账号作用域列表

description.zh: 读取实验服务账号作用域名称并与项目基线比较，不获取凭据、令牌或资源数据。
description.en: Read scope names for the lab service account and compare them with the project baseline without retrieving credentials, tokens, or resource data.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/project/project-id
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/project/numeric-project-id

title.zh: 读取实验项目标识

description.zh: 只读取实验项目 ID 作为最小证据，并避免继续枚举组织、资源或其他项目。
description.en: Read only the lab project ID as minimal evidence and avoid enumerating organizations, resources, or other projects.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/project/attributes/ssh-keys
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/ssh-keys

title.zh: 列出项目属性键名

description.zh: 只列出实验项目属性键名，不读取 ssh-keys 或其他可能包含敏感配置的属性值。
description.en: List only lab project attribute key names without reading ssh-keys or other attribute values that may contain sensitive configuration.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/kube-env
获取Kubernetes环境变量

title.zh: 列出实例属性键名

description.zh: 只列出实验实例属性键名，不读取 kube-env、启动脚本、SSH 密钥或其他属性内容。
description.en: List only lab instance attribute key names without reading kube-env, startup scripts, SSH keys, or other attribute contents.

patches.expectedCommand:
http://169.254.169.254/computeMetadata/v1/
使用内网IP代替域名

title.zh: 对比主机名与链路本地地址

description.zh: 在同一实验实例中比较两个官方寻址形式，验证修复必须按最终连接地址分类，而不是只过滤主机字符串。
description.en: Compare the two documented addressing forms on one lab instance to verify that remediation classifies the final connected address rather than filtering only a hostname string.

patches.expectedCommand:
MySQL通信协议:
- 握手包
- 认证包
- 命令包
需要构造符合协议的数据

title.zh: 发送 Gopher 无害标记

description.zh: 让实验取回器向固定的字节记录监听器发送唯一文本标记，只验证 scheme 与端口可达性。
description.en: Have the lab fetcher send one unique text marker to a fixed byte-recording listener, validating only scheme and port reachability.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 构造MySQL协议数据包
# 需要使用工具生成
gopher://127.0.0.1:3306/_[MySQL Protocol Data]

# 使用sqlmap
gopher://127.0.0.1:3306/_[sqlmap生成的payload]

title.zh: 验证 dict Scheme 端口边界
title.en: Validate the dict Scheme Port Boundary

description.zh: 使用同一隔离监听器测试 dict scheme 是否被允许连接 3306，不把返回字节解释为数据库响应。
description.en: Use the same isolated listener to test whether the dict scheme can connect to port 3306 without interpreting returned bytes as a database response.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 使用Gopherus工具
python gopherus.py --exploit mysql
输入用户名和SQL命令
生成Gopher URL

# 或使用mysql_gopher_attack工具

title.zh: 通过实验取回接口提交 Gopher URL
title.en: Submit a Gopher URL Through the Lab Fetch Endpoint

description.zh: 向专用实验取回接口提交编码后的固定主机 URL，保存结果和出站日志，不生成 MySQL 报文。
description.en: Submit an encoded fixed-host URL to the dedicated lab fetch endpoint and preserve the result plus egress logs without generating MySQL packets.

title.zh: 通过实验取回接口提交 dict URL
title.en: Submit a dict URL Through the Lab Fetch Endpoint

description.zh: 以相同固定主机和唯一标记复测另一非 HTTP scheme，比较拒绝策略和最终连接证据。
description.en: Retest another non-HTTP scheme with the same fixed host and unique marker, comparing rejection behavior and final-connection evidence.

patches.expectedCommand:
如果MySQL允许空密码连接
可以更容易构造攻击载荷

title.zh: 复测非 HTTP Scheme 与数据库出口阻断
title.en: Retest Non-HTTP Scheme and Database Egress Blocking

description.zh: 修复后重放固定实验 URL，确认应用拒绝 gopher 或网络层阻断 3306，同时正常 HTTPS 取回仍可用。
description.en: Replay the fixed lab URL after remediation to confirm that the application rejects gopher or the network blocks port 3306 while normal HTTPS fetching still works.
